name: XML External Entity Injection (XXE)
description: Detects XML endpoints that may be vulnerable to XXE by identifying XML content-type acceptance and testing for entity expansion. XXE can lead to file disclosure, SSRF, and denial of service.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Disable external entity processing in all XML parsers. Use JSON instead of XML where possible. If XML is required, use defused XML libraries. Implement input validation to reject DOCTYPE declarations.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: XXE is used for file exfiltration (reading /etc/passwd, config files with credentials), internal port scanning via SSRF, and denial of service via billion laughs attack.
